description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test - collector that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and allows manual triggering. The workflow should have two jobs: one for linting and one for building. The lint job should run on ubuntu-20.04, check out the code, set up Go 1.14, and run golangci-lint-action. The build job should also run on ubuntu-20.04, check out the code, set up Go 1.14, and run make in the collector directory.
